redacted_summary: A reusable skill was installed successfully after an unsupported plugin-style command failed and the operator switched to the supported package-install method. The skill installation completed with a successful exit signal and was linked into the agent environment. A separate document-generation request did not complete because the required login authorization=[REDACTED] out. A recurring recovery-check job continued to run silently and correctly suppressed duplicate user-facing notifications after detecting that prior notification had already occurred.
